chapter_title.ar: باب فِي قِلَّةِ الصَّلَاحِ فِي النِّسَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 152 – Scarcity of the righteousness among the women

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/330)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/330)
text: هُ قَالَ لِامْرَأَةِ سَعْدٍ هَنِيئاً لَكِ يَا خَنْسَاءُ فَلَوْ لَمْ يُعْطِكِ اللَّهُ شَيْئاً إِلَّا ابْنَتَكِ أُمَّ الْحُسَيْنِ لَقَدْ أَعْطَاكِ اللَّهُ خَيْراً كَثِيراً إِنَّمَا مَثَلُ الْمَرْأَةِ الصَّالِحَةِ فِي النِّسَاءِ كَمَثَلِ الْغُرَابِ الْأَعْصَمِ فِي الْغِرْبَانِ وَ هُوَ الْأَبْيَضُ إِحْدَى الرِّجْلَيْنِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl, from Sa’ad Bin Abu Amro Al Jallab,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said to the wife of Sa’ad: ‘Congratulations to you, O Khansa’a! So even if Allah<sup>azwj</sup> does not Give you anything except for your daughter, Umm Al-Husayn, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would have (still) Given you abundant goodness. But rather, the example of a righteous woman among the women is like the example of the ‘Chough’ crow among the crows, and it is white in one of its legs’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from Muhammad ibn Ali from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl from Sa‘d ibn abu “Amr al-Jallab who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, once said to the wife of Sa‘d, ‘How fortunate it is for you O Khansa’, if Allah will not give you anything else besides your daughter, mother of al-Husayn; still Allah has given you a great deal of good. The case of a virtuous woman among women is like an al- A‘sam crow among the crows. It is the one which has one white leg.’”
